member.name: T:Prime.BusinessLogic.Triggers.IPinSettings
member.summary: Interface to abstract a set of settings for a given pin.

member.name: P:Prime.BusinessLogic.Triggers.IPinSettings.AttributeValues
member.summary: Gets the pairs of Attribute=>Value to be applied during the software trigger.

member.name: P:Prime.BusinessLogic.Triggers.IPinSettings.Name
member.summary: Gets the pin name of the current IPinSettings.

member.name: T:Prime.BusinessLogic.Triggers.ISoftwareTrigger
member.summary: Business logic interface of the implementation of the software trigger.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.Triggers.ISoftwareTrigger.GetPinsSettings
member.summary: Gets the list of the ISoftwareTrigger's IPinSettings.

member.name: T:Prime.BusinessLogic.Triggers.ITriggersFactory
member.summary: A set of functions working of factories depending on the data type.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.Triggers.ITriggersFactory.CreateSoftwareTrigger(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Creates a SoftwareTrigger object based on the given settings.
member.param: The path to the configuration file provided by the user.
A superset of pin names to be checked on the configuration file.
member.returns: A ISoftwareTrigger to be applied to the FunctionalTest.

member.name: T:Prime.BusinessLogic.Triggers.FactoryBuilder
member.summary: Builds a default IInputDataFactory.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.Triggers.FactoryBuilder.Build
member.summary: Builds a default IInputDataFactory.

member.name: T:Prime.BusinessLogic.Triggers.PinSettings
member.summary: Saves the verified settings for each pin block to be applied during the software trigger events.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.Triggers.PinSettings.#ctor(Prime.PinService.IPin,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.UInt32},System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String},Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The pin to be applied to.
The indexes where this setting should be applied.
The pairs of Attribute=>Value to be applied during the software trigger.

member.name: P:Prime.BusinessLogic.Triggers.PinSettings.AttributeValues
member.summary: Gets the pairs of Attribute=>Value to be applied during the software trigger.

member.name: P:Prime.BusinessLogic.Triggers.PinSettings.Indexes
member.summary: Gets the indexes where this setting should be applied. If null or empty it will be applied always.

member.name: P:Prime.BusinessLogic.Triggers.PinSettings.Pin
member.summary: Gets the pin to be applied to.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.Triggers.PinSettings.Apply(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Apply the current pin setting if the payload matches.
member.param: The payload from the software trigger pattern instruction.

member.name: T:Prime.BusinessLogic.Triggers.SoftwareTrigger
member.summary: A class with the handling of the software trigger.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.Triggers.SoftwareTrigger.#ctor(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.BusinessLogic.Triggers.PinSettings},Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The path to the configuration file.

member.name: P:Prime.BusinessLogic.Triggers.SoftwareTrigger.ConfigurationPath
member.summary: Gets the path to the configuration of this object.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.Triggers.SoftwareTrigger.Execute(System.UInt32)
member.summary: The function to be executed during the Software Trigger.
member.param: The index provided in the pattern during the Software trigger.

member.name: M:Prime.BusinessLogic.Triggers.SoftwareTrigger.GetPinSettings
member.summary: Get attributes per pin defined in SoftwareTriggerConfiguration.
member.returns: Dictionary with all attributes per pin.

member.name: T:Prime.BusinessLogic.Triggers.SoftwareTriggerSettings
member.summary: Holds the information for the software trigger configuration.

member.name: P:Prime.BusinessLogic.Triggers.SoftwareTriggerSettings.PinSettings
member.summary: Gets or sets List of Loop control configs to edit.

member.name: T:Prime.BusinessLogic.Triggers.SoftwareTriggerSettings.PinSetting
member.summary: Holds the information for a pin.

member.name: P:Prime.BusinessLogic.Triggers.SoftwareTriggerSettings.PinSetting.PinName
member.summary: Gets or sets the pin name for this block.

member.name: P:Prime.BusinessLogic.Triggers.SoftwareTriggerSettings.PinSetting.Indexes
member.summary: Gets or sets the indexes where this pin block applies based on the payload of the software trigger.

member.name: P:Prime.BusinessLogic.Triggers.SoftwareTriggerSettings.PinSetting.AttributeValues
member.summary: Gets or sets the attribute values to apply.
